name: Messstationen Tagesdaten v2 – Vienna Hohe Warte (2000–2023)
description: Daily meteorological measurements from Vienna Hohe Warte station (ID: 5904) provided by GeoSphere Austria Data Hub. The dataset covers the period 2000–2023 and contains daily mean, maximum and minimum air temperature, precipitation sum, sunshine duration, relative humidity, and horizontal visibility.

distribution.name: GeoSphere Austria API
distribution.description: REST API endpoint for historical daily station measurements. Station ID: 5904 (Vienna Hohe Warte). Query parameters: start=2000-01-01, end=2023-12-31, parameters=tl_mittel,tlmax,tlmin,rr,so_h,rfb_mittel,vv_mittel.

cr:RecordSet.name: daily_observations
cr:RecordSet.description: One row per calendar day for station 5904 (Vienna Hohe Warte).

cr:field.name: temp_mean_c
cr:field.description: Daily mean air temperature (GeoSphere parameter: tl_mittel)

cr:field.name: temp_max_c
cr:field.description: Daily maximum air temperature (GeoSphere parameter: tlmax)

cr:field.name: temp_min_c
cr:field.description: Daily minimum air temperature (GeoSphere parameter: tlmin). Used to derive the frost-day label: temp_min_c < 0 = frost day.

cr:field.name: humidity_pct
cr:field.description: Daily mean relative humidity (GeoSphere parameter: rfb_mittel)

cr:field.name: visibility_m
cr:field.description: Daily mean horizontal visibility (GeoSphere parameter: vv_mittel)
